title: OSSA v0.4.6 Agent Manifest Schema
description: Open Standard for Software Agents (OSSA) v0.4.6 - Extends v0.4 with Agent Identity, Security Posture, and Protocol Declarations. Backward compatible with v0.4 manifests.

apiVersion.description: OSSA API version (v0.4.6 introduces identity, security posture, and protocol declarations)

kind.description: Resource type: Agent (agentic loops), Task (deterministic steps), Workflow (composition), or Flow (streaming)

security.description: Security posture metadata defining threat model, capability requirements, sandboxing, and network access constraints (v0.4.6)

protocols.description: Protocol declarations for MCP, A2A, and ANP interoperability (v0.4.6)

token_efficiency.description: Token efficiency configuration for cost-optimized execution (v0.4.6)

cognition.description: Reasoning pattern, trace config, and governance for auditable cognition (v0.5.0 draft)

governance.description: Governance and authorization policies including Cedar pre-execution checks and compliance profiles (v0.4.6)

runtime.description: Runtime-specific capability bindings (for Task and Workflow kinds)

composition.description: Workflow composition with sequential/parallel projection (v0.4.6, when kind is Workflow)

name.description: Resource identifier (DNS-1123 subdomain format for Kubernetes compatibility)

uuid.description: Optional UUID v4 for stable cross-system reference

x-signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature block for NIST CAISI identity alignment and provenance verification

publicKey.description: Public key matching the signature, formatted as base64 or PEM

issuer.description: Optional DID or URI of the entity that issued the signature for trust path building

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the signature was generated

signature.description: Optional manifest signature (e.g. Ed25519) for signing

sbom_pointer.description: Optional URL or path to SBOM document (e.g. CycloneDX JSON)

labels.description: Key-value labels for organization and filtering

identity.description: Agent identity model with namespace, versioned identifier, and publisher information (v0.4.6)

catalog.description: Agent catalog metadata for discovery and publication

published.description: Whether this agent is published to a catalog

visibility.description: Agent visibility: public (anyone), private (owner only), internal (organization)

mesh_bindings.description: Spatial and execution bindings for mesh orchestration (e.g., GitLab/Drupal environments)

agentType.description: Agent runtime platform. Specifies which platform/framework will execute this agent.

agentKind.description: Agent functional role. Describes WHAT the agent does in the system.

MeshBindings.description: Bindings linking this OSSA agent to its external execution and spatial environments.

source_project_id.description: The numeric or namespaced source project identifier serving as the execution substrate for this agent.

execution_node_id.description: The UUID representing this agent in the spatial interaction matrix.

AgentIdentity.description: Agent identity model for unique identification, versioning, and publisher attribution (v0.4.6). Enables trust chains, agent discovery, and provenance tracking across registries.

namespace.description: Hierarchical namespace for scoping agent identifiers (e.g., 'acme/platform', 'org.example.agents'). Supports DNS-style or path-style naming.

agent_id.description: Unique agent identifier within the namespace. DNS-1123 label format for maximum compatibility.

version.description: Agent identity version (semver 2.0.0). Independent of manifest version, tracks the agent's own release lifecycle.

publisher.description: Publisher information for trust and attribution

checksum.description: Content-addressable checksum of the agent manifest for integrity verification

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this agent identity was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last identity update

AgentScopeExtension.description: AgentScope framework-specific runtime configuration. AgentScope is a production-ready Python agent framework with ReAct agents, RL training, realtime voice, MCP/A2A support, and rich memory backends.

capabilities.description: AgentScope-specific capabilities enabled for this agent

orchestration.description: Multi-agent orchestration pattern when used in composition

max_iters.description: Maximum reasoning-acting loop iterations for ReActAgent

formatter.description: Message formatter for the model provider

skill_dirs.description: Paths to SKILL.md directories to register as agent skills

Publisher.description: Publisher information for agent attribution, trust, and contact. Enables trust chains when combined with PGP signatures.

pgp_key.description: PGP public key fingerprint or URL for verifying signed manifests. Enables cryptographic trust chains.

registry_url.description: URL to the publisher's agent registry

SecurityPosture.description: Security posture metadata defining the agent's threat model, required capabilities, sandboxing requirements, and network access constraints (v0.4.6). Enables security-aware orchestration and policy enforcement.

tier.description: Trust and authorization tier used for Cedar pre-execution policy evaluation and capability constraints.

threat_model.description: Threat categories this agent is designed to handle or is exposed to. Used by orchestrators for security-aware task routing.

category.description: Threat category from OWASP LLM Top 10 and agent-specific threats

severity.description: Assessed severity level for this threat category

mitigations.description: Mitigation strategies implemented for this threat

description.description: Human-readable description of the threat and its context

capabilities.description: Capability requirements declare what permissions and system access the agent needs to function.

required.description: Capabilities the agent MUST have to function correctly. Orchestrators should reject execution if these are not available.

optional.description: Capabilities the agent can use if available but does not require. Enables graceful degradation.

sandboxing.description: Sandboxing requirements for isolating agent execution.

required.description: Whether sandboxed execution is mandatory for this agent

max_execution_seconds.description: Maximum execution time in seconds before forced termination

network_access.description: Network access constraints for controlling agent communication boundaries.

allowed_domains.description: Allowlist of domains the agent may connect to. Supports wildcard subdomains (e.g., '*.example.com'). Empty array means no network access.

blocked_domains.description: Denylist of domains the agent must never connect to. Takes precedence over allowed_domains.

protocols.description: Allowed network protocols. Restrict to 'https' for maximum security.

egress_policy.description: Default egress policy. 'allow-list' requires explicit allowed_domains, 'deny-all' blocks all outbound, 'allow-all' permits any outbound.

data_classification.description: Data classification level this agent is authorized to handle. Enforced by orchestrators for data-aware routing.

log_inputs.description: Whether to log all inputs to the agent

log_outputs.description: Whether to log all outputs from the agent

log_tool_calls.description: Whether to log all tool invocations

retention_days.description: Number of days to retain audit logs

ProtocolDeclarations.description: Protocol declarations for agent interoperability (v0.4.6). Declares which agent communication protocols this agent supports, enabling automatic discovery and routing by orchestrators.

mcp.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) configuration for tool serving and consumption

a2a.description: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol configuration for Google's agent interoperability standard

anp.description: Agent Network Protocol (ANP) configuration for decentralized agent networking

MCPProtocol.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) declaration. Specifies MCP server/client capabilities for tool-based interoperability with Claude, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible clients.

servers.description: MCP server configurations this agent exposes or connects to

command.description: Command to launch server (for stdio transport)

tools.description: List of tool names exposed by this server

resources.description: List of resource URIs exposed by this server

A2AProtocol.description: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol declaration. Google's standard for agent interoperability, enabling task delegation, status updates, and artifact exchange between agents.

endpoint.description: A2A endpoint URL where this agent can be reached

agent_card.description: A2A Agent Card fields for discovery

name.description: Agent display name in A2A network

stateTransitionHistory.description: Whether agent maintains task state history

ANPProtocol.description: Agent Network Protocol (ANP) declaration for decentralized agent networking. Enables DID-based identity, verifiable credentials, and peer-to-peer agent communication.

did.description: Decentralized Identifier (DID) for this agent. Enables decentralized identity verification and trust without a central authority.

credential_url.description: URL to the verifiable credential document

verifiable_credentials.description: Verifiable credentials issued to this agent for trust establishment

registry_url.description: URL of the ANP agent registry

advertise.description: Whether to advertise this agent in the network

TokenEfficiency.description: Token efficiency configuration for cost-optimized agent execution

serialization_profile.description: Manifest serialization profile. full=200-400 tokens (discovery), compact=60-120 tokens (runtime), fingerprint=15-30 tokens (routing)

observation_format.description: How tool observations are formatted. diff=returns diff not full file. projected=only matched fields. summary=compressed summary.

allocation_strategy.description: How budget is divided across pipeline stages

CascadeStage.description: A stage in a model cascade pipeline

budget_share.description: Fraction of total budget allocated to this stage

budget_tokens.description: Absolute token budget for this stage

condition.description: Condition expression for when to use this stage

cascade.description: Model tiers in order of cost (e.g., [haiku, sonnet, opus])

ConsolidationStrategy.description: Trajectory consolidation strategy for multi-turn interactions

strategy.description: How aggressively to consolidate trajectory history

retain.description: Fields to always retain (e.g., final_answer, confidence)

summarize.description: Fields to summarize instead of keeping verbatim

drop.description: Fields to drop entirely (e.g., raw_observations, intermediate_diffs)

accumulate.description: Fields to accumulate with a token cap

strategy.description: Compression approach: template=pattern replacement, semantic=LLMLingua-style, hybrid=both

min_quality.description: Minimum quality threshold - do not compress if quality drops below this

Capability.description: Capability declaration with optional fingerprint for routing without loading full descriptions

fingerprint.description: Deterministic hash of capability type signature for routing without loading full descriptions

Cognition.description: Reasoning pattern, thought trace configuration, and governance for auditable agent cognition (v0.5.0 draft). First-class spec-level primitive for NIST/FedRAMP alignment.

WorkflowComposition.description: Workflow composition with output projection for sequential and parallel agent execution

project.description: Output field projection - only these fields pass to the next agent

shared_context.description: Deduplicate input context across parallel branches

Governance.description: Governance and authorization policies mapped to Cedar or OPA engines.

clearance_level.description: Numeric clearance level required for this agent

policy_references.description: List of Cedar (or other) policy IDs this agent must adhere to
